title: Ember Awakening: A Hero's First Steps
description: An introductory campaign designed for new adventurers. Learn the fundamentals of combat, magic, and inventory management as you help the village of Ashvale deal with a growing threat.

acts.name: The Troubled Village
acts.description: You arrive in Ashvale to find its inhabitants living in fear. Wolves and goblins have been raiding the outskirts. The village elder asks for your help — this is your first test of combat.

encounters.name: Wolf Pack at the Farm
encounters.description: Three wolves circle the farmer's barn. Defeat them to learn basic melee combat.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Use your basic attack action. Remember to check your HP after each hit!

encounters.name: Goblin Scouts
encounters.description: A small goblin scouting party spotted near the mill. Introduces flanking and positioning.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Goblins are cunning. Use the environment to your advantage — positioning matters.

objectives.description: Speak with the village elder in Ashvale
Reach the threatened farmstead
Defeat the wolves at the farm
Drive off the goblin scouts near the mill

acts.name: The Forbidden Cellar
acts.description: The elder reveals an old cellar beneath the inn is infested with undead. You must clear it out — and in doing so, learn how magic spells can turn the tide of battle.

encounters.name: Skeleton Guardians
encounters.description: Skeletons patrol the cellar entrance. Your first encounter with undead — blunt weapons and holy spells work best.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Try using a scroll or spell! Skeletons are vulnerable to bludgeoning damage.

encounters.name: The Risen Dead
encounters.description: Deeper in the cellar, zombies shamble toward you. Learn about slow enemies and area-of-effect spells.
encounters.tutorial_hint: The skeleton archer attacks from range. Close the distance or use a scroll of fireball!

objectives.description: Speak with the innkeeper before entering the cellar
Reach the deep cellar below the inn
Clear the cellar entrance of skeletons
Defeat the undead in the deep cellar
Recover the village relic from the cellar chest

acts.name: The Goblin Ringleader
acts.description: With the cellar cleared, a goblin boss reveals himself as the architect behind the raids. Confront him and his gang — and learn how to manage your inventory mid-battle.

encounters.name: Goblin Ambush on the Road
encounters.description: Goblins strike from the treeline. A chance to practice using potions and consumables during combat.
encounters.tutorial_hint: You can use items during your turn! Try using a potion of healing when below 50% HP.

encounters.name: Boss: Grixnok the Goblin Boss
encounters.description: Grixnok and two bodyguards make their last stand. Apply everything you've learned.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Target the boss last or first — your choice! But don't ignore the minions entirely.

objectives.description: Reach the goblin ambush site on the road
Survive and break the goblin ambush
Defeat Grixnok the goblin boss
Recover the stolen village goods from the goblin cache
Return to the village elder with news of the victory

acts.name: Herb Gathering in the Wilds
acts.description: The village healer needs rare herbs from the forest edge, but dangerous creatures lurk among the undergrowth. Learn to gather resources while managing threats in the wilderness.

encounters.name: Wolves Among the Thickets
encounters.description: A pair of dire wolves guard the herb-rich clearing. Defeat them to access the healing plants.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Dire wolves hit harder than regular wolves. Use a potion if your HP drops below half.

encounters.name: Giant Spider Nest
encounters.description: A giant spider has spun webs across the path to the rarest moonpetal grove.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Spiders can poison you. Keep antidotes or healing potions ready.

objectives.description: Speak with the village healer about the needed herbs
Reach the herb clearing past the wolf territory
Defeat the dire wolves guarding the clearing
Gather healing herbs from the forest
Collect moonpetals from the spider-guarded grove

acts.name: The First Dungeon
acts.description: A collapsed mine on the village outskirts has been overtaken by skeletons and oozes. Descend into the darkness to learn dungeon navigation, torch management, and how to handle mixed enemy types.

encounters.name: Skeleton Miners
encounters.description: Undead miners still swing their pickaxes in the dark. Learn to fight in confined spaces.
encounters.tutorial_hint: In tight corridors, only one enemy can reach you at a time. Use this to your advantage.

encounters.name: The Ooze Pit
encounters.description: An ochre jelly blocks the passage deeper into the mine. Slashing weapons are less effective against it.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Oozes resist slashing damage. Try using blunt weapons or magic instead.

encounters.name: Mine Collapse Chamber
encounters.description: A zombie and skeletons guard the mine's deepest chamber where iron ore still glints.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Focus fire on one enemy at a time to reduce incoming damage quickly.

objectives.description: Enter the collapsed mine
Clear the skeleton miners from the upper tunnels
Defeat the ochre jelly blocking the lower passage
Collect iron ingots from the mine depths

acts.name: The Merchant Escort
acts.description: A traveling merchant needs safe passage through bandit-controlled roads to reach the next town. Learn to protect an NPC ally while managing waves of enemies along a route.

encounters.name: Roadside Bandits
encounters.description: Bandits emerge from behind overturned carts to ambush the merchant wagon.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Keep the merchant behind you. If enemies reach the wagon, you fail the escort.

encounters.name: Worg Riders
encounters.description: Goblin riders on worgs charge from the treeline in a mounted assault.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Worgs are fast. Use ranged attacks or scrolls to soften them before they close in.

objectives.description: Speak with the merchant to begin the escort
Defeat the bandit ambush on the road
Defeat the worg riders attacking the wagon
Reach the destination town safely with the merchant

acts.name: Craft Training at the Forge
acts.description: The village blacksmith offers to teach you the basics of crafting. Gather materials from nearby sources and learn to combine them at the forge. A clay golem guards the best ore vein.

encounters.name: Cave Guardians
encounters.description: Skeletons haunt the entrance to the ore cave where the finest steel ingots can be found.
encounters.tutorial_hint: After combat, search the area for crafting materials. Loot everything.

encounters.name: The Clay Guardian
encounters.description: A clay golem protects the deepest ore vein, left behind by an ancient miner-mage.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Golems are resistant to many damage types. Use acid or adamantine weapons if available.

objectives.description: Speak with the village blacksmith about crafting
Gather iron ingots from the cave
Find steel ingots from the golem-guarded vein
Defeat the clay golem guarding the deep vein
Return to the forge and craft your first item

acts.name: Combat Basics: The Training Yard
acts.description: The village militia captain invites you to the training yard. Face progressively tougher sparring partners to master defensive stances, special attacks, and the use of scrolls in combat.

encounters.name: Sparring with Imps
encounters.description: Summoned imps serve as agile sparring partners. Learn to deal with fast, evasive enemies.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Imps are small and quick. Area spells like fireball can hit multiple imps at once.

encounters.name: The Cockatrice Challenge
encounters.description: A captured cockatrice tests your ability to avoid special attacks. Its bite can petrify.
encounters.tutorial_hint: The cockatrice can turn you to stone. Stay at range or use protective scrolls.

objectives.description: Speak with the militia captain about advanced combat
Defeat the imp sparring partners
Survive the cockatrice challenge
Complete all exercises in the training yard

acts.name: Town Defense: The Night Raid
acts.description: Ashvale is under attack. Orcs and goblins assault the walls under cover of darkness. Rally the militia, defend the gates, and protect the villagers in this multi-wave defense scenario.

encounters.name: First Wave: Goblin Assault
encounters.description: Goblins swarm the eastern gate with crude ladders and torches.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Defense missions have waves. Conserve potions for later waves when enemies get tougher.

encounters.name: Second Wave: Orc Warriors
encounters.description: Orc warriors batter down the western gate with a ram. Hold the breach.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Orcs are strong but slow. Kite them through chokepoints for tactical advantage.

encounters.name: The Ogre Breacher
encounters.description: A massive ogre leads the final push, hurling boulders at the town hall.
encounters.tutorial_hint: The ogre has high HP. Use your strongest abilities and scrolls to burn it down fast.

objectives.description: Speak with the village elder about the defense plan
Repel the goblin assault at the eastern gate
Hold the western gate against the orc warriors
Defeat the ogre breacher
Secure the town hall after the battle

acts.name: The Graduation Trial
acts.description: The village council declares you ready for the wider world. One final trial awaits: descend into the Proving Cavern and defeat the troll guardian to earn your adventurer's writ. This is the culmination of all tutorial lessons.

encounters.name: Undead Sentinels of the Cavern
encounters.description: Zombies and a wraith guard the entrance to the Proving Cavern.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Wraiths are incorporeal. Magic damage works best against them.

encounters.name: The Troll Guardian
encounters.description: A massive troll serves as the final test. Use fire to stop its regeneration and prove your worth.
encounters.tutorial_hint: Trolls regenerate HP each turn unless hit with fire. Use fire essence or fireball scrolls.

objectives.description: Receive the trial briefing from the village council
Enter the Proving Cavern
Defeat the undead sentinels at the entrance
Defeat the troll guardian to complete the trial
Collect the adventurer's writ from the trial chest
